desired_outcome: Synthesise the gathered customer intake data with the corpus to produce a personalised COM-B 6-week behaviour-change plan that identifies capability gaps, opportunity levers, and motivational strategies, and translates them into concrete weekly actions the customer can realistically undertake.
name: create-plan

desired_outcome: Conduct a structured customer intake interview to systematically gather user data including goals, current behaviours, perceived barriers, available resources, and motivational drivers that will inform a personalised COM-B behaviour-change plan.
name: intake
